== Notes for [[Item:Q111916|Q111916]] ==

'''Not''' supported by primary sourcing. '''MedLands''' (28 Feb 2019) '''[https://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/Galicia.htm#MunioGutierrezdied959 Galicia Nobility 9th–11th Century]'''

-----------

DIY:
*https://ancestors.familysearch.org/en/9F74-H9H/conde-de-celanova-teobaldo-n%C3%BAnes-de-celanova-1005-1090

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
